title: 5 Pcs Professional Nail Files - 100/180 Grit, Double-Sided Washable Half-Moon Emery Boards for Nail Shaping, Manicure, and Salon or Home Use

features: Durable & High-Quality Material: Made with premium emery board and sturdy sponge, these nail files are designed for long-lasting use, ensuring effective nail shaping and smoothing without breaking or bending.

Dual Grit Design (100/180): Features a double-sided grit for versatile use—100 grit for shaping and shortening nails, and 180 grit for refining edges and achieving a smooth finish, perfect for natural or acrylic nails.
Ergonomic Half-Moon Shape: The unique half-moon design offers a comfortable grip and precise control, making it easy to shape nails with accuracy and reduce hand fatigue.
Washable & Reusable: These nail files are easy to clean and maintain, ensuring hygienic use for both personal and professional settings, ideal for salons or at-home manicures.

Versatile & Multi-Purpose: Suitable for all nail types, including natural, acrylic, and gel nails, these professional-grade files are perfect for manicures, pedicures, and touch-ups, catering to both beginners and experts.
Portable & Lightweight: Compact and lightweight, these nail files are perfect for on-the-go use, fitting easily into your purse or travel kit for quick nail fixes anytime, anywhere.
Professional Salon Quality: Designed to meet professional standards, these emery boards deliver salon-quality results, making them an essential tool for nail technicians and home users alike.
description: Product description Nail files are an essential grooming tool for maintaining well-manicured hands and feet. These handy little implements come in various shapes, sizes, and materials to suit different preferences and needs. From the classic emery board to the more durable metal files, they help smooth and shape nails, removing rough edges and achieving the desired length and shape. Whether you prefer a gentle buffing action or a more aggressive filing, nail files offer a convenient and affordable way to keep your nails looking neat and polished. Compact and portable, they can be easily stashed in a handbag, desk drawer, or travel kit, ensuring your nails are always groomed on the go. With proper use and care, a good quality nail file can last for months, making it a worthwhile investment for anyone who values well-maintained nails. So, keep one handy and enjoy the satisfaction of perfectly filed nails anytime, anywhere. Directions Use for smoothing and shaping nails.
